winner: David and Victoria Beckham argued with their Cotswolds neighbors over who owns the stripes on the road.

candidates.text: Why did David and Victoria Beckham start arguing with their Cotswolds neighbors? Because someone kept setting up a goal post in their shared backyard!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Puns on 'goal post' tie into Beckham's football background, offering a clever twist on the planning row."}

candidates.text: David and Victoria Beckham are reportedly having a disagreement with their neighbors over plans to build a wall... ...just like the one they have around their hearts.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Smart wordplay on the 'wall around their hearts' referencing their private life, specific to the Beckham context, and concise."}
